# animation.web

> Banque d'animations web production-ready pour React/Next.js. Code copiable, CSS inclus, instructions d'integration.

## API

- [List all animations](/api/animations): GET /api/animations
- [Get animation by slug](/api/animations/{slug}): GET /api/animations/{slug} — returns code, CSS, and instructions
- [Search animations](/api/animations/search?q={query}): GET /api/animations/search?q={query}&tags={tags}&difficulty={difficulty}&include_code=true

## MCP Server

POST /api/mcp — Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0) endpoint for AI agents.

Available tools:
- list_animations: List all animations, filterable by difficulty and tag
- get_animation: Get complete code + CSS + integration instructions for a specific animation
- search_animations: Search animations by keyword

## Available Animations

- 3d-tilt: 3D Tilt Hero — Images with perspective tilt on mouse move
- path-draw: SVG Path Draw — Stroke animation triggered on scroll
- flow-lines: Flow Lines — Animated SVG dashes flowing to a hub
- flow-circles: Flow Circles — Colored circles traveling along SVG paths
- s-curve-arrow: S-Curve Arrow — Arrow following an S-curve with smooth easing
- border-spin: Border Spin — Rotating conic-gradient border on hover
- scroll-arcs: Scroll Arcs — Concentric arcs rotating based on scroll position
- marquee: Marquee — Infinite horizontal scrolling loop
- char-spin: Char Spin — Characters appearing with Y-axis rotation
- anti-grid-tabs: Anti-Grid Tabs — Tabs with concave curves connecting to content
- eye-tracking: Eye Tracking Tilt — Cards with eyes following cursor + 3D tilt
- card-carousel: Card Carousel Effects — Multiple hover effects (fan, stack, 3D fade, colorize, camera)
